idea-plugin.name: FluentAutoGenerator
idea-plugin.description:
FluentAutoGenerator is a comprehensive FluentMigrator code generation plugin for JetBrains Rider that accelerates migration development with smart templates, navigation tools, and customization options.

Key Features

  • Multiple Migration Types: Forward-only, forward-only with embedded SQL, and up/down migrations
  • Custom Templates: Create and manage your own migration templates with placeholder support
  • Migration Tags: Tag migrations with custom labels (e.g., Development, Production, Staging)
  • Smart Navigation: Gutter icons to quickly navigate from C# code to associated SQL files
  • SQL File Generation: Create standalone SQL migration files alongside C# migrations
  • Git Integration: Auto-populate migration names and descriptions from your current Git branch

What it generates

  • Forward only migration - creates a ForwardOnlyMigration class with an EmbeddedScript call
  • Forward only migration with SQL - generates both a .cs file and a .sql file in a Sql/ subfolder with automatic embedding
  • Up/down migration - creates a standard Migration class with Up() and Down() methods
  • SQL file - creates a standalone .sql file for migration scripts
  • Custom template migrations - generates migrations from your user-defined templates

How to use

  1. Right-click a folder in Solution Explorer and select FluentMigrator
  2. Choose from available migration types or your custom templates
  3. Enter a migration name and optionally select tags from the dialog
  4. The plugin creates the files with auto-generated timestamps and namespaces

Configuration

Access settings via File → Settings → Tools → FluentMigrator Generator to:

  • Define available migration tags (comma-separated list)
  • Configure tag formatting (string literals vs. raw identifiers applicable for predefined constants in project)
  • Create and manage custom migration templates with placeholders: {Namespace}, {Timestamp}, {ClassName}, {BranchName}, {Tags}, {Prefix}

Smart Features

  • Automatic project detection - menu only appears in FluentMigrator projects
  • Timestamp-based versioning (UTC)
  • Git branch-based descriptions
  • Gutter icons for navigating between C# migrations and their SQL files

action.text: Create Forward only migration with SQL
